org.arakhne.neteditor.swing.actionmode

Interface ActionModeOwner<G extends Graph<?,?,?,?>>

  • Type Parameters:
    G - is the type of the supported graph.
    All Superinterfaces:
    ActionModeManagerOwner<Figure,SwingViewGraphics2D,Color>

    public interface ActionModeOwner<G extends Graph<?,?,?,?>>
extends ActionModeManagerOwner<Figure,SwingViewGraphics2D,Color>
    This interface describes a container of modes.
    Version:
    17.0 2013-10-23 21:03:09
    Author:
